title: Rorippa teres
taxonomy: Rorippa teres is classified in the kingdom Plantae, belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as mustard or cabbage family. This classification places it within the order Brassicales and the subfamily Brassicoideae. The genus Rorippa is part of the tribe Brassiceae. Further, Rorippa teres is categorized as a species within the genus Rorippa. Its classification also includes being a member of the class Magnoliopsida and the division Magnoliophyta.
